assets.name: Primary wordmark
assets.description: The parent 'cleo.' wordmark — always lowercase, DM Sans Bold in Slate with a Sage Green period. Use on Cream or light backgrounds.

assets.name: App icon / mark
assets.description: Rounded-square Sage mark with a cream 'c' and peach period, for avatars, favicons, and app tiles.

assets.name: Cleo Track wordmark
assets.description: Product lockup 'cleo track.' — lowercase, Slate with the Sage period. Use on light backgrounds.

assets.name: Cleo Routine wordmark
assets.description: Product lockup 'cleo routine.' — lowercase, Slate with the Sage period. Use on light backgrounds.

assets.name: Cleo Plan wordmark
assets.description: Product lockup 'cleo plan.' — lowercase, Slate with the Sage period. Use on light backgrounds.

assets.name: Cleo Connect wordmark
assets.description: Product lockup 'cleo connect.' — lowercase, Slate with the Sage period. Use on light backgrounds.
